en: More coffee, hon? Yeah, just keep it coming, please. Sure thing.
Oh, good. Real nice. Just put that anywhere, pal. Yeah. Good save.
Don't you worry about cholesterol, lung cancer, love handles?
I don't worry about anything anymore. What makes you so special?
Everybody worries about something. That's exactly what makes me so special.
I don't even have to floss.
and doubly dying shall go down to the vile dust from whence he sprung.
Unwept, unhonored, and unsung, Sir Walter Scott.
